meaning: n.鍗婂浐浣揳dj.鍗婂浐浣撶殑
examples: Semisolid material such as the type precipitated by sewage treatment.
Semisolid forming has taken its place among advanced metallurgy material processing fields.
Controlling deformation and flow of semisolid alloy slurry is the key of die casting of semisolid alloy.
